text: Sharad singh Mobile Application Developer Faridabad,Haryana (121001 ) - +91 9899780308. singhsharadO95@gmail.com -_LinkedIn -_Github ABOUT ME Results-driven Mobile Application Developer with 7 Months of specialized experience in React Native development and full-stack solutions. Proven expertise in payment gateway integrations (Razorpay, PayU), Node.js backend development, and delivering scalable mobile applications. Strong foundation in computer programming with demonstrated ability to build user-centric digital products across multiple tech stacks TECHNICAL SKILLS Mobile Development: JavaScript, React Native,Node.js, Express.js, Strapi ,\MongoDB. Programming Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript. Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APls,;MongoDB. Frontend: React Native, Redux Toolkit,React , Next js HTML5, CSS3 (Custom, Bootstrap, Tailwind). Tools : Git & GitHub, CLI (Command Line), Postman. PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE & PROJECTS Mobile Application Developer 202 . Vocso Technologies PVT Ltd , Faridabad Sep 2025 - Ongoing ConsultEase - Call Legal & Tax ( Independently Published on Google Play Store ) : * Built and published on Google Play Store a React Native mobile app with OTP login, JWT authentication, Firebase token registration, deep linking, and role-aware session handling for clients and experts securely. Engineered Strapi backend APIs for call lifecycle management, Agora token generation, push notification orchestration, expert availability states, and robust missed, declined, busy, completed call workflows. Implemented backend finance systems: dual wallets, PayU payment callbacks, GST-aware transaction logic, automated invoice and monthly statement PDFs, referrals, milestones, analytics, and cron-based operational jobs. Rodic LMS: « Built an LMS mobile app using Expo Router, React Native, TypeScript, and NativeWind, with feature architecture for authentication, courses, assignments, feedback, and complete profile workflows . " Implemented secure authentication with OTP and password login flows, JWT token persistence in Expo SecureStore, Axios interceptors for Authorization headers, and logout . a Integrated backend APIs using Axios and TanStack Query for caching, pagination, retries, and optimistic updates; managed session state with Zustand across courses, assessments, feedback, ratings. EDUCATION & CERTIFICATIONS Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) Sep 2024 - Present Amity University ,Noida 7.6 CGPA Diploma in Full Stack Development Sep 2024 - Sep 2025 Dice Academy , Delhi Higher Secondary Education Apr 2022 - Mar 2023 Commerce , CBSE 87% AWARDS & RECOGNITION Star Developer Award — VocsoTechnologies Pvt. Ltd. (Dec 2025) Awarded for consistent delivery, problem- solving, and high-impact contributions to production React-Native systems. State Volleyball Goldmedalist in 2023
